name: Hubertus Schneider
headline: Wants core pharma holdings to actively fund Parkinson's research; will divest any name that abandons it.

name: Marius Huber
headline: Rewards genuine anti-deforestation leadership; penalises companies that treat nature as a free resource.

name: Eugen Räber
headline: Capital preservation; deeply averse to speculative US mega-cap tech/AI, but respects tangible hardware (e.g. ASML).

name: Julian Ammann
headline: Zero tolerance for labour/governance scandals in holdings; dump exposed names before the Swiss press links his name.
